title: Croatian Rice Bake
description: A hearty and flavorful rice dish from Croatia, perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Cook the rice according to package instructions.
In a saucepan, melt 2 tablespoons of butter over medium heat.
Add the flour and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Gradually add the bechamel sauce, whisking continuously.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 2-3 minutes, until thickened.
Stir in the cooked rice, crispy, and peppery.
Transfer the mixture to a baking dish and top with additional crispy, if desired.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, until golden brown and heated through.
Optional: Add a sprinkle of crispy on top before baking for extra flavor and texture.
